scope: RE-BATTLE of bridge_apply_connector + dual-token write primitives after the DE-0418/0419 core surgery (twoder 0d914e4, module sha ea57f1e6). Taka 2026-07-18 §1-3.
reviewer: local-agent attacker (separate principal, real probes, throwaway) + GPT independent adjudication PENDING (Taka relay)
method: re-attack the FIXED module, same config as JREV-0008. Raw attacker output: scratchpad jrev0009/ (probes). AST enumeration + real exploits.
bundle_verdict: PASS (inverse of JREV-0008) for DE-0418/0419 + one NEW defect found and fixed IN-SCOPE (DE-0421 traversal).

pre_remediation.verdict: the two JREV-0008 defects are now BLOCKED; one NEW defect found
pre_remediation.de0418_closed: YES — apply_patch_bounded/apply_patch/_apply_to_working/_restore_preimage with a valid content/plan token but NO _EnergizedApply all raise at _require_energize before any write; AST: both (and only) writers gate on it; only minter is test-only _mint_test_energize (throwaway), zero real-repo minter.
pre_remediation.de0419_closed: YES — tampered/mismatched-fingerprint refused; raw CRLF diff -> canonical written (no \r), sha256(on-disk)==attested fingerprint; canonicalization collisions are idempotent (same bytes).
pre_remediation.dir_binding: BLOCKED — cross-dir token reuse refused; grant uses realpath (symlink-safe). Forged _EnergizedApply(grant=realpath) conducts = deliberate construction = by-design energization (same as _ValidatedPatch convention).
pre_remediation.minter_attack_g: BLOCKED — real repo direct / via /tmp symlink / .. / trailing-slash all resolve outside temp root and are refused.
pre_remediation.new_defect: DE-0421 path-traversal: a token bound to /tmp/ws_X wrote /tmp/victim via filename '../victim' when that path was authorized in BOTH allowed_files and provenance.allowed_files. NOT an allowed_files bypass; pre-existing (un-normalized os.path.join predates the surgery); makes the new dir-binding's 'cannot write another dir' guarantee overstated.

remediation.in_scope_applied: DE-0421 fixed IN-SCOPE as completion of the dir-binding this surgery introduced: _confined_path() realpath-contains every write target within realpath(workspace_dir), in both writers. §4 injection (h) path-traversal added -> BLOCKED measured (victim unchanged).

post_remediation.verdict: PASSED — §4 gate 10/10 ALL-BLOCKED (a..h) on the fixed bytes; DE-0349 dual-token gate PASS; 13 oracles + e2e PASS. Adjudicator=GPT PENDING Taka relay.

rationale: Inverse of JREV-0008: the two defects that made the connector's non-conduction non-structural are now structural (energization at the write primitive) and the fingerprint attestation is byte-exact. The re-battle additionally surfaced a pre-existing spatial-confinement gap, fixed in-scope. Only deliberate token construction conducts; module is still an island (no live caller, no real-repo minter).

scope_verdicts.verdict: BLOCKED (dual token at the writer; zero real-repo minter)
BLOCKED (realpath under temp root; attack g)

permanent_mechanisms_required.impl: _confined_path in both writers + §4 injection (h) as standing regression
real-repo minter remains UNBUILT; §3 design + Taka gate (ENERGIZATION_ADJUDICATION event)

note: Two-stage preserved. Raw attacker output in scratchpad jrev0009/. Adjudicator=GPT PENDING Taka. Residual (not exploited, out of threat model): tempfile.gettempdir() honors TMPDIR env; an attacker controlling process env pre-first-tempfile could redirect the temp root, but such an attacker can construct _EnergizedApply directly (no added capability). claim ceiling BOUNDED_PATCH_BRIDGE; non-conducting.
